title: Origins: Mirrored one
description: You are the reflection on the other side of a mirror, escaped into this world!
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Mirrored one

**You are the reflection on the other side of a mirror, escaped into this world!**

## Abilities

- Refraction 🔎
  - Using [Primary Activator] the user can teleport where they are looking( maximum 22 block), becoming invisible for a few seconds. 
  - If they look at an entity while teleporting, they can enter and spectate the target. 
  - While inside an entity, the user can use [Primary Activator] to exit the body, dealing damage to the entity and take no damage for half seconds. 
  - You won't deal damage as you leave by sneaking.
- Reflection 💭
  - While spectating, the user can bless or curse the entity. Pressing [Load toolbar] will grant a positive effect (strength and resistance) and while pressing [Save toolbar] gives negative effects (weakness and slowness)
  - If the entity has lower than 2 heart, the user can push out the soul of the entity using [Secondary Activator], taking over its movement.
  - If the target dies or healed up, or user dies when controling, the user is forced out of the body.
  - Use [Secondary Activator] to leave control of the body.
- Camouflage ⬜
  - You are partially transparent, and your armor are fully transparent.
  - While around transparent blocks (glass, water), you are even more transparent- almost invisible
- Shatter ⚪️
  - The user takes more damage. Shatter will activate when players not in full health.
  - While shatter is active, every time the user gets hit it damages the attacker.
- Glass skin 🤍
  - Due to being made from reflections, you gain some of the qualities of mirrors
  - You take a little extra damage from falling and kinetic energy
